title: Maselli Misure S.p.A. Information ransomware incident

extortion.description: Maselli Misure S.p.A. InformationFor over 70 years, Maselli has been a trusted family-owned business, dedicated to designing and manufacturing innovative optical technology for in-line and laboratory quality control analysis. Based in Parma, Italy, Maselli has a worldwide network of sister companies, distributors, and agents, making it a leading supplier of analytical instruments across multiple industries. At Maselli, we are committed to providing world-class instruments that can withstand the most critical challenges of modern industries. Our products are highly customizable to meet specific application requirements in diverse sectors, including Food & Beverage, Pharmaceutical, Chemical, Petro-Chemical, Textile, and more. With Maselli's cutting-edge technology, our customers can achieve reliable and accurate quality control measurements to ensure the highest standards of production.Geo: Italy - Leak size: 49 GB Archive - Contains: Files,SQL
